title: tecoma venusta
intro: Tecoma venusta, also known as the Yellow Trumpet or Mexican Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Bignoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tecoma venusta include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as relieving symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The herbal preparations of Tecoma venusta often include making teas, tinctures, and infusions from its flowers, leaves, and stems.
